title: Build hardware procurement, flashing, and resale pipeline for T-Echo nodes
description: Finalize hardware resale strategy. Specific next steps: 1. Contact LilyGO sales for bulk pricing quote on 500+ T-Echo units (target <0/unit). 2. Design scalable flashing/provisioning pipeline (jig, automated script, key provisioning for TOFU). 3. Define resale process post-conference (online storefront, warranty, source code offer per GPL). 4. Model full P&L: procurement, flashing labor, shipping, margin at 5 sale price. 5. Explore partnerships with existing LoRa/Meshtastic resellers. 6. Plan for initial 500 unit inventory management. --type=task --priority=2 --parent=project-LICHEN-2h1i --json
